title: Is it possible to have Monday.com Feature Requests progress notiifcations via email?
excerpt: We are looking for a more productive way to get notifications, preferably by email, for submitted feature requests to follow keeping track. Since, there is no way to officially get feedback from development besides havin…

posts.author: Clu (Luke McCabe)
posts.cookedHtml: We are looking for a more productive way to get notifications, preferably by email, for submitted feature requests to follow keeping track. Since, there is no way to officially get feedback from development besides having to manually check the community page often. The requests can take weeks, months, or even years if ever implemented.

posts.author: jack456jokky (Jack Jokky)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
When someone submits a request, they receive a confirmation email that not only acknowledges their input but also promises to unlock a “time capsule” update at set intervals (e.g., every month). Inside, there are updates about similar requests, current priorities, and even a glimpse into the development team’s brainstorming sessions. This creates a sense of anticipation and keeps everyone engaged.
